ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2022 Continued To Jul-19-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiffs Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment And Award Of Attorneys Fees And Court Costs
Off Calendar Mar-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Peter M. Lee, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:14 a.m.

Rebecca A. Caley, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Financial Services Vehicle Trust, by and through its servicer, BMW Financial Services NA, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
Cody Moore, Sales & Marketing Manager and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Caley and Mr. Moore appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Peter M. Lee, an individual.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Common Counts, Claim & Delivery and Conversion was filed on July 27, 2020, and personally served on defendant Peter M. Lee, an individual, on September 18, 2020.
Default as to defendant Peter M. Lee, an individual, was entered on January 19, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 17, 2021.

Plaintiff Financial Services Vehicle Trust, by and through its servicer, BMW Financial Services NA, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:

Exhibit 1: Vehicle Lease Agreement....................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Certificate of Title.......................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Pay-Off Quota as of April 1, 2020..........................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 4: Invoices from Skipbusters..................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 5: NACA Used Cars/Trucks Values...............................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Financial Services Vehicle Trust, by and through its servicer, BMW Financial Services NA, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendant Peter M. Lee, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $35,225.65.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,812.90.
Attorney Fees - $3,924.00.
Costs - $1,005.65.
Recovery Fees - $800.00.
Unpaid Lease Payments - $1,938.64

Total - $49,706.84.

Counsel for plaintiff to prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 10:36 a.m.
